footer.tagline: Rooted in the timeless traditions of Indian craft, Sitara Vastram brings premium ethnic fashion to every woman — from the daily grace of cotton to the splendour of bridal silk.

labels.breathable_relaxed_pieces_for_everyday_w: Breathable, relaxed pieces for everyday wear.
labels.for_the_bride_and_her_closest_circle: For the bride and her closest circle.

1.title: Summer Collection 2026
1.subtitle: Latest Collection · New Season
1.description: Light cotton suits and breezy kurta sets for the modern Indian woman — effortlessly graceful from morning to evening.

2.title: Festive Splendour
2.subtitle: Celebrate with Grace
2.description: From Diwali diyas to Eid celebrations — rich embroideries, jewel-toned silks, and handcrafted dupattas for your most joyful moments.

3.title: Bridal Dreams
3.subtitle: For the Bride & Her Circle
3.description: Step into your most beautiful chapter with hand-embroidered lehengas, Banarasi silks, and heirloom-inspired suit sets.

4.title: New Arrivals
4.subtitle: Fresh This Week
4.description: Discover our latest designs — salwar suits, printed kurtas and palazzo sets crafted for the woman who loves to stand out.

5.title: Pure Cotton
5.subtitle: Rooted in Comfort
5.description: Our organic cotton collection — hand-block printed by artisans in Jaipur — brings nature's softness to your everyday style.

1.title:
The Art of
Banarasi Weaves
1.description: Hand-woven on ancient looms by master weavers in Varanasi, our silk collection preserves a 2000-year-old tradition. Each saree and suit set carries the soul of a craftswomen who poured her heart into every thread.

2.title:
Your Wedding
Chapter Begins
2.description: From mehendi to vidaai, from sangeet to the mandap — our bridal collection is an ode to Indian womanhood. Each piece is crafted with hand embroidery, intricate zardozi and a love that lasts beyond the celebration.

3.title:
Cotton That
Breathes Freedom
3.description: Our organic cotton collection is dyed with natural pigments, hand-block printed by women artisans in Jaipur, and designed to last. Sustainable fashion that is kind to you, kind to the weaver, and kind to the planet.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We're here to help with orders, sizing, returns, and styling advice.
contact.intro: Reach our customer care team by phone, email, or WhatsApp. We typically respond within 24 hours on business days.
contact.sent: Thank you! We've received your message and will get back to you shortly.

sizeGuide.title: Size Guide
sizeGuide.subtitle: Find your perfect fit for suits, kurta sets, and ethnic wear.
sizeGuide.intro: Measurements are in inches. For the best fit, measure over light clothing and compare with the chart below. If you're between sizes, we recommend sizing up for a relaxed fit.

sections.heading: How to Measure
list: Bust/Chest: Measure around the fullest part of your chest.
Waist: Measure around your natural waistline.
Hip: Measure around the fullest part of your hips.
Length: Measure from shoulder to desired hemline.

sections.heading: Fit Tips
paragraphs: Our ethnic wear is designed with comfortable ease. Kurtas and suit sets may have 1–2 inches of wearing ease built in.
For bridal or festive pieces with heavy embroidery, consider one size up for comfort.

shipping.title: Shipping Information
shipping.subtitle: Fast, reliable delivery across India.
shipping.intro: We dispatch most orders within 1–2 business days. Delivery timelines vary by location and product type.

sections.heading: Delivery Timelines
list: Remote areas: up to 10 business days
Made-to-order / bridal pieces: 10–21 business days (confirmed at checkout)

sections.heading: Shipping Charges
paragraphs: Free standard shipping on orders above ₹999. Orders below ₹999 incur a flat ₹99 shipping fee.
Express shipping may be available at checkout for select pin codes.

sections.heading: Order Tracking
paragraphs: Once your order ships, you'll receive an SMS and email with tracking details. You can also track orders from your account under My Orders.

returns.title: Returns & Refunds
returns.subtitle: Hassle-free returns within 7 days of delivery.
returns.intro: We want you to love every Sitara Vastram piece. If something isn't right, we're happy to help with a return or exchange.

sections.heading: Return Eligibility
list: Items must be unused, unworn, and with original tags attached
Returns requested within 7 days of delivery
Customised, altered, or sale items marked final sale are not eligible
Innerwear and hygiene-sensitive items cannot be returned

sections.heading: How to Return
paragraphs: Log in to your account, go to My Orders, and select Return/Exchange. Our team will arrange a pickup or share return instructions.
Refunds are processed to your original payment method within 5–7 business days after we receive and inspect the item.

sections.heading: Exchanges
paragraphs: Exchanges are subject to stock availability. For size exchanges, we recommend initiating a return and placing a new order if your size is low in stock.

faqs.title: FAQs
faqs.subtitle: Answers to common questions about shopping with Sitara Vastram.
faqs.intro: Can't find what you're looking for? Contact us — we're happy to help.

items.q: How do I track my order?
items.a: Sign in to your account and open My Orders, or use the tracking link sent via SMS and email once your order ships.

items.q: Do you offer Cash on Delivery?
items.a: Yes, COD is available on most orders across India, subject to pin code serviceability.

items.q: Are your products authentic handloom and handcrafted?
items.a: Yes. We work directly with weavers and artisan clusters across India. Product pages list fabric, craft, and origin details.
Orders can be cancelled before they are shipped. Once dispatched, please initiate a return after delivery.

items.q: How should I care for silk and embroidered pieces?
items.a: Dry clean only for silk and heavily embroidered garments. Cotton pieces can be hand-washed in cold water with mild detergent.
Currently we ship within India only. International shipping will be announced on our website and newsletter.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.subtitle: Last updated: June 2025
privacyPolicy.intro: Sitara Vastram respects your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

sections.heading: Information We Collect
list: Name, phone number, email, and delivery address when you place an order or create an account
Payment information processed securely by our payment partners (we do not store full card details)
Browsing data, device information, and cookies to improve your experience

sections.heading: How We Use Your Information
paragraphs: We use your data to process orders, provide customer support, send order updates, and — with your consent — share offers and new collection announcements.

sections.heading: Data Security
paragraphs: We use industry-standard encryption and secure servers. Access to personal data is limited to authorised personnel only.

sections.heading: Your Rights
paragraphs: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data by emailing care@sitaravastram.com.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Please read these terms before using our website.
terms.intro: By accessing or purchasing from sitaravastram.com, you agree to these terms and conditions.

sections.heading: Use of Website
paragraphs: You must be 18 years or older to make a purchase. You agree not to misuse the site, attempt unauthorised access, or copy our content without permission.

sections.heading: Products & Pricing
paragraphs: We strive for accurate product descriptions and images. Minor colour variations may occur due to screen settings and handcrafted nature of our products. Prices are in INR and may change without notice.

sections.heading: Orders & Payment
paragraphs: An order is confirmed only after successful payment (or COD confirmation). We reserve the right to cancel orders in case of pricing errors, stock issues, or suspected fraud.

sections.heading: Limitation of Liability
paragraphs: Sitara Vastram is not liable for indirect or consequential damages arising from use of our website or products, to the extent permitted by law.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.subtitle: How we use cookies on sitaravastram.com
cookies.intro: Cookies are small text files stored on your device to help our website work better and remember your preferences.

sections.heading: Types of Cookies We Use
list: Essential cookies: required for cart, checkout, and account login
Analytics cookies: help us understand how visitors use our site
Preference cookies: remember language and display settings

sections.heading: Managing Cookies
paragraphs: You can control or delete cookies through your browser settings. Disabling essential cookies may affect site functionality such as checkout and wishlist.
